_comment: Chinese names for ids that FactorioLab's zh i18n leaves untranslated (mostly Dark Fog combat content and upgrade tiers). Merged on top of factoriolab-dsp-i18n-zh.json by transform-data.ts, so it survives seed refreshes. Names verified against the bilibili DSP wiki (wiki.biligame.com/dsp); weapon-damage tiers follow the established FactorioLab pattern of the translated siblings (动能/能量/爆破武器伤害). Recipe names are derived from their output item, so only item names are listed here.
